---
name: Feedback & suggestions
about: Share product feedback, UX ideas, or site-operator suggestions (not a code bug)
title: '[Feedback] '
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

**What is your feedback about?**

- [ ] Admin UX
- [ ] CLI / developer experience
- [ ] Theme / visitor site
- [ ] Notifications & alerts
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

**Current experience**

What happens today that feels wrong, missing, or confusing?

**Suggested improvement**

What would better look like? Examples or references welcome.

**Who is this for?**

<!-- e.g. first-time installer, theme author, content editor, self-hosted ops -->

**Additional context**

Version, screenshot, or workflow — optional. For **security** issues use [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/fecommunity/reactpress/blob/master/SECURITY.md) instead.
